creator: eric.siroh@gmail.com
text:
The Fix patch should be:

diff -Nur py-vatnumber.orig/Makefile py-vatnumber/Makefile
--- py-vatnumber.orig/Makefile  2013-06-07 13:06:27.000000000 +0800
+++ py-vatnumber/Makefile       2013-06-07 09:26:34.000000000 +0800
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      vatnumber
-PORTVERSION=   1.0
+PORTVERSION=   1.1
 CATEGORIES=    finance python
 MASTER_SITES=  GOOGLE_CODE
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
diff -Nur py-vatnumber.orig/distinfo py-vatnumber/distinfo
--- py-vatnumber.orig/distinfo  2013-06-07 13:06:27.000000000 +0800
+++ py-vatnumber/distinfo       2013-06-07 09:26:40.000000000 +0800
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (vatnumber-1.0.tar.gz) = 6ef6103f7ecf09cdf32b87bb1c87616b72b9546e4b364a3b66d2b0b4b340665a
-SIZE (vatnumber-1.0.tar.gz) = 21693
+SHA256 (vatnumber-1.1.tar.gz) = ff7017420e137609a74ce0dbe6ba16c86ea5317d50ca398f8f423141c07fae18
+SIZE (vatnumber-1.1.tar.gz) = 22032
